occurrence_sentence: Riverlane and the MIT Plasma Science and Fusion Center (PSFC) will work to develop efficient quantum algorithms for the simulation of plasma dynamics.

Researchers from quantum error correction company Riverlane and the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) Plasma Science and Fusion Center (PSFC) will work to develop efficient quantum algorithms for the simulation of plasma dynamics under the U.S. Department of Energy's Fusion Energy Sciences (FES) program.

interaction_phrase: under the U.S. Department of Energy's Fusion Energy Sciences (FES) program
